mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate reduces the discount rate applied to future corporate cash flows, mechanically expanding equity valuations and producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A rapid month-over-month decline in the unemployment rate signals accelerating labor demand that outpaces wage inflation, boosting corporate profit margins and driving positive short-term equity momentum.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE falls > 0.2 percentage points in 1 month
failure_condition: The signal produces negative or flat 5-day forward returns in more than 55% of triggered instances over a 5-year backtest.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production combined with increasing housing starts indicates synchronized real-economy expansion across goods and services sectors, supporting broad corporate earnings growth and positive monthly equity returns.
failure_condition: The joint signal fails to outperform a buy-and-hold benchmark in more than 60% of rolling 12-month windows.

mechanism_narrative: During a tightening cycle, concurrent increases in policy rates and consumer prices compress equity risk premiums as discount rates rise faster than expected earnings growth, generating negative quarterly forward returns.
failure_condition: Quarterly forward returns under this joint signal are statistically indistinguishable from zero or positive over a 10-year sample.

mechanism_narrative: Month-over-month growth in retail sales directly reflects strengthening consumer expenditure, which drives near-term earnings revisions and produces positive S&P 500 returns over the subsequent 5 trading days.
failure_condition: The signal exhibits a negative or flat directional accuracy below 50% across all market conditions in a 3-year out-of-sample test.

mechanism_narrative: A quarterly acceleration in the industrial production index exceeding 1.0 index point signals capacity utilization recovery and supply-side resilience, which supports cyclical equity valuations over a monthly horizon.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO rises > 1.0 index point in 3 months
failure_condition: Forward 20-day returns remain negative or flat in more than 50% of triggered episodes despite the index threshold being breached.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent positive revisions in nonfarm payrolls and real GDP confirm broad-based economic expansion, sustaining equity risk premiums and generating positive quarterly forward market returns.
failure_condition: The joint indicator fails to produce a positive information coefficient greater than 0.05 over any 5-year rolling estimation window.

mechanism_narrative: During a housing market correction, a sharp decline in housing starts paired with persistent inflation triggers stagflation expectations that compress equity multiples and drive negative short-term market returns.
failure_condition: The combined signal yields positive 5-day forward returns in more than 60% of triggered instances over a 10-year backtest.
